channel.title: GitHub Nim Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Nim in GitHub

item.title: nim-lang/Nim
item.description: Nim is a statically typed compiled systems programming language. It combines successful concepts from mature languages like Python, Ada and Modula. Its design focuses on efficiency, expressiveness, and elegance (in that order of priority).

item.title: status-im/nim-blscurve
item.description: Nim implementation of BLS signature scheme (Boneh-Lynn-Shacham) over Barreto-Lynn-Scott (BLS) curve BLS12-381

item.title: nim-lang/nimble
item.description: Package manager for the Nim programming language.

item.title: status-im/nim-confutils
item.description: Simplified handling of command line options and config files

item.title: ringabout/awesome-nim
item.description: A curated list of awesome Nim frameworks, libraries, software and resources.
